open_questions.summary: Resolved by Datoviz commit 8bb192c2da6df70279eedac5b2eaed9f45aab96c: DvzQueryResult now exposes _fields_ and GSP smoke can read required query fields.
Resolved by P005 response: keep debug-json diagnostic, create separate gsp.conformance.fixture schema, start with ADR/spec skeleton before array transport.
Resolved by P006 response: S020 is ADR/spec/negative-conformance first; arbitrary fetch and dynamic extension loading are reserved but rejected by default.
Resolved by P007 response: start with HTTP single-resource as access mechanism and use a preconfigured `.npy` typed array proof before tile pyramids/Zarr/OME-Zarr or JPEG/PNG.

Resolved by P009 response: S024 defines public TextVisual only, defers GlyphVisual/atlases, uses screen-pixel font sizes, radians, explicit anchors, generic font roles, ASCII conformance with Unicode capability gates, and item-level query guidance.

Resolved by P010 response: S025 defines public MeshVisual only, inline indexed triangles, strict 2D flat uniform/per-face RGBA conformance, capability-gated 3D/normals/shading/query, and defers resources/materials/textures/instancing.

Resolved by P011 response: S026 defines ColorScale, canonical named colormaps, explicit linear normalization, scalar image/point/marker color encodings, semantic ColorbarGuide, scalar query payloads, and defers broad colormap/norm/legend behavior.

Resolved by P012 response: S027 is 2D-first with finite invertible affine transforms, deterministic linear View2D, required query inverse payloads, and public 3D camera/projection/controller semantics deferred.
Resolved by P021 response: S037 is View3D navigation plus Datoviz View3D binding; materials/lights/textures remain deferred; legacy 3D math is internal-only reuse.

recommendations: Run M163 next: implement View3D navigation protocol dataclasses and pure reducers.
Keep materials/lights/textures deferred to future S038/S039/S040 specs; review-only demos must not be capability evidence.
Do not claim Datoviz public 3D support until M165/M166 evidence proves retained View3D DATA/NDC3/depth semantics.
notes: M164 completed: added Matplotlib live review View3D navigation adapter using canonical S037 actions/results; left-drag orbit, right/middle-drag pan, wheel zoom, and r reset.
M163 completed: added protocol-only View3D navigation action/result dataclasses, orbit/pan/zoom/set/reset reducers, snapshot freshness enforcement, exports, and focused tests.
M162 completed: archived P021 response, accepted S037 as View3D navigation plus Datoviz View3D binding, added ADR-0024, S037 decision record, View3D navigation spec, and capability wording updates.
S037 opened with P021 as a ChatGPT Pro gate for public View3D navigation, legacy 3D reuse, Datoviz View3D binding, and material/light/texture scope.
M161 completed: added P021 consultation packet, S037 scoping note, and blocked dependent S037 missions pending the P021 response.
S037 legacy audit recorded safe internal reuse candidates: projection/depth/culling/normal helpers; legacy camera/material/light/texture public models remain gated by P021.

S036 opened from P020: static camera-parameter-first View3D, orthographic projection, MeshVisual (N,3) DATA/NDC integration, opaque depth capability, ray readback, and public 3D navigation deferred to a later stage.
M154 completed: converted P020 into ADR-0023, spec/view3d.md, S036 decision records, protocol View3D dataclasses/enums/diagnostics/capabilities, and focused validation tests; M155 is ready.

M155 completed: added deterministic View3D DATA projection, projection snapshot identity, and numeric fixtures for canonical cube projection, reversed bounds, off-axis bounds, and snapshot changes; M156 is ready.
M156 completed: added Matplotlib (N,3) MeshVisual DATA/NDC projection rendering, Datoviz structured unsupported diagnostics, backend specs, and focused tests.
M157 completed: added the adapted Matplotlib opaque face-depth fixture boundary, alpha-not-strict diagnostics, clipping documentation, and focused tests.
M158 completed: added View3D ray query payload/readback, stale snapshot diagnostics, and deferred 3D mesh picking diagnostics.
M159 completed: added static View3D review examples for cube, terrain, and NDC depth, plus the alpha-not-strict negative example.
M160 completed: added S036 closeout, updated capability matrix/docs, and marked S036 completed.
M075 implemented TextVisual protocol dataclass/enums/validation and focused tests in commit f0ff72b.
M076 implemented Matplotlib TextVisual reference rendering and focused tests.
M077 added S024 TextVisual QA cases, Matplotlib artifact generation, and Datoviz structured unsupported reporting for text pending M078/M079.

M078 added Datoviz text/glyph/font capability evidence artifacts; uv environment lacks importable Datoviz text symbols, while sibling source contains retained text/glyph APIs, so M079 should keep unsupported unless runtime bindings are activated and semantics verified.
M079 kept Datoviz TextVisual as structured unsupported because placement, anchors, font-size, rotation, and font-role semantics are not verified; QA routes TextVisual through adapter diagnostics.
M080 added a minimal VisPy2 text producer API that emits TextVisual without exposing glyphs, atlases, arbitrary font names, rich text, or backend calls.
M081 added item-level TextVisual query/readback payloads for the Matplotlib reference path; glyph-level query remains deferred.
S024 closeout: all S024 missions M073-M081 are complete; stage marked completed at 100%.
S025 opened with mission batch M082-M089; M082 is ready, M083 is blocked pending P010, and implementation missions remain draft.
M082 completed: created P010 Mesh/3D protocol consultation packet and opened Q080; M083 remains blocked pending the response.
M083 completed: accepted S025 MeshVisual v1 baseline from P010; M084 is ready for protocol dataclass/validation implementation.
M084 completed: added MeshVisual protocol/enums/validation and 9 focused tests; M085 is ready for Matplotlib renderer/QA smoke.
M085 completed: added Matplotlib MeshVisual renderer, S025 QA suite/cases, and focused tests; M086 is ready for Datoviz mesh probe.
M086 completed: extended Datoviz probe with mesh symbols/capabilities and source evidence; M087 is ready.
M087 completed: added Datoviz MeshVisual unsupported gates/adapter entry point and focused tests; M088 is ready.
M088 completed: added bounded VisPy2 MeshVisual producer APIs, strict 2D mesh example, API docs, and focused tests; M089 is ready for query/readback and S025 closeout.
M089 completed: added typed MeshVisual face-query/readback payloads for the strict 2D Matplotlib reference path, documented deferred mesh query semantics, and closed S025.
M090 completed: opened S026 for color mapping/colorbars/scalar data semantics, created P011 ChatGPT Pro consultation packet, and blocked M091 pending response.
M091 completed: converted P011 into ADR-0018, `spec/color_mapping.md`, S026 decision records, and adjacent spec updates; M092 is ready.
M092 completed: added S026 color mapping protocol dataclasses/enums, optional scalar visual encodings, and focused validation tests; M093 is ready.
M093 completed: added Matplotlib reference scalar color rendering/query behavior, semantic colorbar guide rendering, and focused tests; M094 is ready.
M094 completed: added S026 visual QA suite cases, Matplotlib review artifacts, protocol color mapping example, and examples docs; M095 is ready.

M095 completed: added Datoviz S026 color mapping symbol/capability probes and artifacts; sibling checkout import works locally and runtime bindings expose image/point/colorbar/query candidates, with marker scalar fill and mesh face scalar still capability-gated; M096 is ready.
M096 completed: added bounded VisPy2 S026 color scale, scalar image/point/marker encoding, and colorbar guide producer APIs with examples and focused tests; S026 is closed.

M097 completed: added Datoviz S026 scalar image/point CPU pre-mapping, retained scalar query payload decoration, shared protocol color-mapping helpers, structured colorbar/marker gates, and focused tests; full suite passed with 346 passed and 2 skipped.
M098 completed: opened S027 for transform/view/camera/navigation semantics, created P012 ChatGPT Pro consultation packet, and blocked M099 pending the response.
M099 completed: converted the P012 response into ADR-0019, `spec/transforms.md`, S027 decision records, adjacent spec updates, and M100 protocol-validation mission records.

M100 completed: added S027 transform protocol resources/bindings/enums, stricter View2D validation, transform query payload shell, capability helpers, and focused tests; full pytest passed with 351 passed and 8 skipped.

M101 completed: added Matplotlib reference transform/view helpers, transformed renderer/query paths, transform query payload output, and focused tests; full pytest passed with 357 passed and 8 skipped.

M102 completed: added Datoviz S027 transform capability metadata, bounded finite eager NDC inline-affine CPU adaptation for point/marker/segment/path, transform query inverse unsupported diagnostics, and focused tests; full pytest passed with 359 passed and 8 skipped.
M103 completed: added VisPy2 affine2d helper, visual transform parameters, set_view2d convenience, and focused tests; full pytest passed with 363 passed and 8 skipped before tuple typing cleanup.

M104 completed: added S027 visual QA cases for inline/named affine equivalence, View2D DATA/NDC overlay, and cross-family affine+View2D coverage; added transform-query inverse fixture coverage; closed S027 after auditing and deleting ANSWER.
S028 opened as a ready planning stage for Guide/View2D integration. M105 is the next local Mission Control task.

M105 completed: audited guide/tick/grid/query, VisPy2, Matplotlib, Datoviz, and S027 transform authority. No durable architecture conflict was found. The actionable gap is that `View2D` accepts reversed limits while the deterministic tick resolver and guide tests still reject or omit reversed-domain behavior.
M106 completed: updated `spec/transforms.md`, `spec/query.md`, `spec/vispy2/api.md`, Matplotlib/Datoviz backend specs, and visual QA guidance for reversed `View2D` guide semantics. M107 is ready.

M107 completed: `resolve_ticks()` now accepts reversed finite domains for deterministic auto ticks, explicit ticks remain unchanged, Matplotlib guide rendering applies `View2D` x/y limits, and focused/nearby tests passed.

M108 completed: fixed reversed-bound spine hit testing, added reversed auto/explicit guide query coverage, added scoped all-rendered reversed `View2D` ordering coverage, and validated focused/nearby query tests.

M109 completed: added S028 visual QA suite cases for auto-grid and reversed-explicit guide/View2D scenes; extended QA scene artifacts/rendering to carry axis and panel text guides; added VisPy2 reversed guide render coverage. Focused QA/VisPy2 tests and nearby guide tests passed; mypy was clean.

M110 completed: added the S028 Datoviz guide/View2D capability report, kept Datoviz axis support adapted with explicit tick labels, strict reversed-domain proof, guide query, and all-rendered guide query reported by structured unsupported/unverified diagnostics, and closed S028.
P013 response accepted: S029 should be Backend Capability Matrix and Visual Review Pack, with render-first review artifacts and strict promotion only after explicit contract evidence.
M112 completed: added the S029 capability matrix schema, review-pack generator, Datoviz review-pack runtime wrapper, focused tests, and Mission Control opening records.
summaries: S033 correction: enforced Datoviz legacy_srgb_blend as the renderer and visual-QA comparison default, made missing legacy pipeline support fail loudly, and made the legacy all-cases sheet the primary review artifact.

M129 completed: updated release-facing limitations for adapted Datoviz text and guide rows, validated status JSON, diff whitespace, and strict MkDocs build, and left M131 blocked pending explicit release approval.

M128 completed: audited the six adapted Datoviz rows, chose release-preparation as the default branch, left strict promotion as optional M130, and blocked M131 release operations pending explicit approval.

M125 completed: added required Unreleased changelog sections for fixed items, backend support, and known limitations; tightened README backend wording; docs build, package build, import-surface tests, JSON validation, and diff whitespace checks passed.

M124 completed: required release validation passed; optional example confidence checks passed after lazy-loading optional Datoviz legacy imports in examples and making protocol_live_window honor GSP_TEST.
M123 completed: opened S031 as a release-candidate stabilization and roadmap reset stage, with M124 ready for release validation baseline audit and M125-M126 drafted for wording/review-pack closeout.

M113 completed: audited Datoviz rendered point, marker, segment, path, image, and overlay rows; promoted only exact S029 rendered scopes to strict, kept text/mesh/color/transform adapted, and regenerated the S029 review pack.

M114 completed: audited Datoviz color/colorbar rendered rows; promoted scalar image colorbar, scalar point gray range, and scalar marker fill alpha to strict rendering-only status, while preserving query_supported false.

M117 completed: audited Datoviz transform rows; promoted inline/named affine equivalence, reversed View2D DATA-to-NDC overlay, and bounded cross-family affine+View2D rendering to strict while preserving query_supported false.

M118 completed: kept Datoviz guide/View2D rows unsupported with row-specific blockers for backend auto ticks/grid/title proof, explicit tick labels, reversed domains, and guide/all-rendered query support.
M119 completed: regenerated the final S029 review pack, closed S029 with strict=52/adapted=4/unsupported=2, and opened S030 as the bounded Datoviz guide-axis proof stage.
Created S029 continuation batch M115-M119 for Datoviz text, mesh, transform, guide/View2D, and final review-pack closeout so work can resume cleanly on another machine.
